## 📝 Describe the improvement
A clear and concise description of what needs to be improved.

## 💡 Proposed changes
If you have specific text or examples to add, please share them here.

## 📚 Additional Context
Add any other context about the documentation improvement here.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've read the current documentation
- [ ] This improvement would help other users
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this (optional)
